ops.title: P2b cutover: expand/sweep/shortlist run KeyError on legless plan
ops.body: In the uncommitted P2b leg-intent cutover, trips.compile_graph guards a legless plan with a typed UsageError ("plan.legs must be a non-empty list before compiling", exit 64, trips.py:1086/1230). But the command entry points journeys.run (journeys.py:501 legs=plan["legs"]), sweeps.py:39, and shortlist.py:78/320 index plan["legs"] with no guard, so expand/sweep/shortlist run on a fresh legless trip crash with an unhandled KeyError: legls traceback (exit 1) instead of the typed UsageError. The pytest suite (1001 passing) has no coverage for this path.
